Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health & Safety Code.

ORDER and JUDGMENT are signed in open court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, email: mtorreano@sftc.org; torreanom@aol.com
